zh.Shrewsbury, Shropshire Unitary Authority: 英國史洛普爾史福斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Thorne於1445年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾勒頓 希 堂斯時，他的父親Thomas Thorne Esq23歲，母親Mary Corbet19歲。他於1481年與Jane Kynaston在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1531年在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利享年86歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Thorne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’. Compare   Thornton  .
Swedish (mainly Thörne): ornamental or perhaps topographic name from törne ‘rose bush’ or thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’.

variants.name: Thorn
meanings: English and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or hedge (Old English, Old Norse thorn, Middle English thorn(e), torn(e)). The name is also found in Sweden.
English: habitational name from a place called with Old English, Old Norse thorn ‘thorn bush’ (see 1 above), for example Thorne in Kent, Somerset, and South Yorkshire.
North German and Danish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, from Middle Low German torn ‘tower’.

variants.name: Thurn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Katharina, Milbert.

German: topographic name for someone who lived near a watchtower, or a metonymic occupational name for someone responsible for manning one, from Middle High German turn, turm ‘tower’. In some cases it may be a habitational name from any of the many places called with this word in the Rhineland, Bavaria, Austria, and Bohemia.
English (Warwickshire): variant of   Thorne  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Thorne was born in 1445, in Ruyton XI Towns, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Thorne Esq, was 23 and his mother, Mary Corbet, was 19. He married Jane Kynaston in 1481, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1531, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

Il a épousé Jane Kynaston en 1481, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1531, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre.

Er hat 1481 in England, United Kingdom Jane Kynaston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. ko.Shelvock, Ruyton-XI-Towns, Shropshire Un: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 루이턴 스이 타운스
ko.lifeSummary: Roger Thorne(이)가 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 루이턴 스이 타운스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Thorne Esq(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Corbet(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1481년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Jane Kynaston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1531년 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Thorne nasceu em 1445, em Ruyton XI Towns, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Thorne Esq, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mary Corbet, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Kynaston em 1481, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Shelvock, Ruyton-XI-Towns, Shropshire Un: руитон кси тоунс, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Thorne родился в 1445 г. в местности руитон кси тоунс, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Thorne Esq было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Corbet, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Kynaston в 1481 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1531 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия.
